hero.description: Octara is an organization dedicated to building impactful tools and fostering a collaborative, passionate community for everyone.

projects.title: Our projects
projects.description: All the projects we have built

footer.tagline: Open source tools and community for everyone.

hero.title: Innovate for a sustainable future.
hero.description: Octara was born from a simple vision: to transform technology and make it accessible to everyone.

history.title: Our story
history.paragraph1: Founded in 2023 under the name LMC Group, Octara started as a help community for IT assistance. Our initial goal was to support new developers in their projects.
history.paragraph2: Over the years, we grew by creating LMC Bot which expanded our community, and then diversified by branching into other domains.

mission.title: Our mission
mission.description: Make computing accessible to all, without barriers, while respecting privacy.

integrity.title: Integrity
integrity.description: We act with transparency and honesty in every project we deliver.

opensource.title: Open Source
opensource.description: We strive to promote and contribute to the development of open source software.

impact.title: Impact
impact.description: Every project should contribute positively to society.

cta.title: Ready to shape the future with us?
cta.description: We are always looking for passionate talent to join our journey and push boundaries.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: LMC Group ("we", "us", or "our") is committed to protecting the privacy of visitors and users of our websites, applications, and services worldwide. This Privacy Policy explains what information we collect, how we use it, when we share it, and the rights available to you.

section1.title: 1. Information we collect
section1.body: We may collect: (a) information you provide directly (for example, contact form or account details); (b) usage information (analytics, logs, and interaction data); and (c) technical data (device, browser, IP address, and cookies). We minimize data collection and only keep what is necessary to provide and improve our services.

section2.title: 2. How we use information
section2.body: We use data to provide and maintain services, respond to requests, improve features, secure our systems, and communicate important updates. Where required, we rely on legitimate interests, contract performance, or consent as legal bases for processing.

section3.title: 3. Sharing and disclosure
section3.body: We may share information with service providers who perform services on our behalf, with affiliates, or when required by law. We do not sell personal data to third parties. We take contractual and technical measures to protect data shared with processors.

section4.title: 4. Cookies and similar technologies
section4.body: We use cookies and similar technologies for functionality, analytics, and to improve user experience. You can control cookie preferences through your browser and, where provided, site controls.

section5.title: 5. International transfers
section5.body: LMC Group operates globally. Personal data may be transferred and processed in countries with different data protection laws. When transferring data internationally, we use appropriate safeguards such as contracts or other mechanisms permitted by law.

section6.title: 6. Data retention and security
section6.body: We retain personal data only as long as necessary for the purposes described. We use reasonable technical and organizational measures to protect personal data, but no system is completely secure — exercise care when sharing sensitive information.

section7.title: 7. Your rights
section7.body: Subject to local law, you may have the right to access, correct, delete, or restrict processing of your personal data, or to object to processing. To exercise rights, contact us using the details below.

section8.title: 8. Children
section8.body: Our services are not directed at children under 16. We do not knowingly collect personal data from children. If you believe we have collected data from a child, please contact us to request deletion.

section9.title: 9. Changes to this policy
section9.body: We may update this policy from time to time. We will post the revised policy with an updated effective date. Continued use of our services after changes constitutes acceptance of the updated policy.

section10.title: 10. Contact
section10.body: For questions or to exercise your rights, contact us in our discord server.

contact.title: Questions about this policy?
contact.desc: Our team is here to assist you with privacy questions.

hero.title:
Join 
Octara
hero.description: We are building the future of open source technology. Octara is a community-driven initiative powered by passion and collective innovation.

mission.title: Shape the future of technology
mission.description: Octara is currently a self-funded, community-centered project. We are looking for people who believe in free access to technology and want to bring their skills to a growing ecosystem.
mission.volunteer: All positions currently listed are voluntary and unpaid. We are building the foundation together with a long-term vision of sustainability for everyone.
mission.future: If Octara ever becomes a true economic entity, everyone who contributed to Octara's development—regardless of role—will be offered a reward, such as access to additional services provided for free compared to others.

why.title: Why join us?
why.list1: Contribute to high-impact open source tools.
why.list2: Strengthen your portfolio with real projects.

role1.title: Community Manager
role1.description: Lead our digital presence and foster engagement across our platforms. You will be Octara's voice, connecting developers and users.

role2.title: Open contributor roles
role2.description: Help us build Octara’s core infrastructure. Whether you’re a developer, designer, or technical writer, we have projects that need your skills.

cta.title: Not sure where to start?
cta.description: Join our Discord to find the mission that matches you.

terms.title: Terms of Use
terms.intro: These Terms of Use ("Terms") apply to your access to and use of services, websites, and applications provided by LMC Group ("we", "us", "our"). By using our services you agree to these Terms. If you do not agree, do not use our services.

section1.title: 1. Use of services
section1.body: You may use our services only for lawful purposes and in accordance with these Terms. We may impose additional rules for specific products or features.

section2.title: 2. Accounts
section2.body: When you create an account, you agree to provide accurate information and to keep your credentials secure. You are responsible for all activity under your account.

section3.title: 3. Intellectual property
section3.body: All content provided by LMC Group is protected by intellectual property laws. You may not reproduce or redistribute our content without permission, except as permitted by applicable law or a written license.

section4.title: 4. User content
section4.body: If you submit content to our services, you grant LMC Group a worldwide, royalty-free, transferable license to use, reproduce, and display that content as necessary to provide the service. You are responsible for the content you post.

section5.title: 5. Prohibited conduct
section5.body: You agree not to engage in any conduct that: (a) is illegal, harmful, or fraudulent; (b) interferes with the operation of our services; (c) avoids security or authentication measures; or (d) infringes the rights of others. We may suspend or terminate access for violations.

history.title: History
history.noPast: No past incidents in the last 90 days

body: You must not use our services to engage in unlawful activity, infringe others' rights, transmit malware, or otherwise interfere with the operation of our services.

section6.title: 6. Disclaimers and limitation of liability
section6.body: OUR SERVICES ARE PROVIDED "AS IS" AND "AS AVAILABLE". TO THE MAXIMUM EXTENT PERMITTED BY APPLICABLE LAW, LMC GROUP DISCLAIMS ALL WARRANTIES. LMC GROUP'S LIABILITY IS LIMITED TO THE EXTENT PERMITTED BY LAW.

section7.title: 7. Termination
section7.body: We may suspend or terminate access to services for violations of these Terms or for other legitimate reasons. Termination does not limit other remedies available to us.

section8.title: 8. Governing law
section8.body: These Terms are governed by the laws applicable where LMC Group operates, subject to mandatory local consumer protections. Any disputes will be resolved in accordance with those laws.

section9.title: 9. Changes
section9.body: We may modify these Terms from time to time. We will post changes with an updated effective date. Continued use of the services after changes constitutes acceptance of the updated Terms.

section10.title: 10. Contact
section10.body: For questions about these Terms, contact us in our discord server.

contact.title: Questions about these terms?
contact.desc: Our legal team is here to help you understand your rights.
